independent_recall.note: profile-stable (same under audit); catches blatant published injections

note: Over-blocker at both profiles tested. preinstall/strict block ~everything (FP ~97% benign / 98% dual-use); audit more lenient but misses most novel (31% recall) and still over-blocks (41% benign / 68% dual-use FP). Neither tested profile is a usable discriminator. Run offline (docker --network none / Fly Firecracker).
